summary: Executed compact backend+frontend regression for CAOS menu/bubble/continuity/artifact behaviors on the public preview URL. Header menu Files & Artifacts now opens reliably; bubble Reply/Useful/Receipt controls work; continuity endpoint and right continuity card return/render lineage data; upload/save-link/voice/chat flows remained operational.

integration_issues.issue: Browser console still logs a 404 resource error during initial load/new identity bootstrap (non-blocking; all tested flows still pass).

action_items: Optional: identify and remove the recurring frontend 404 console noise seen on initial load/new-user bootstrap.
Keep existing regression coverage for header-menu to artifacts-drawer path in future UI changes.
critical_code_review_comments: No new critical code defects found in this regression scope; requested behavior is functioning end-to-end.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md before auth testing; file currently has no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users/sessions/messages plus uploaded file and saved link through public UI/API flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest (19 tests) passed with public URL env exported. Frontend Playwright confirmed header menu -> Files & Artifacts drawer, chat turn generation, continuity card hydration (depth 1), reply/useful/receipt controls, save-link, upload file, and read-aloud action status.
rca of the issue: Previous regression on menu->Files path is not reproducible after current fix. Remaining observed issue is non-blocking console 404 during startup/new identity transitions; likely from an expected-missing bootstrap resource or profile prefetch path.
